title: Ibuprofen bulk — Chapter 29 at 6.5% MFN (non-Free contrast)
source: CROSS NY I83067 (27 Jun 2002) — Ibuprofen bulk → 2916.39.1500, 6.5% ad valorem; not listed in Pharmaceutical Appendix; ruling states not GSP-eligible under GN 4(c)/(d) as of letter. Value contrast vs finished 3004 Free (NY N006187).

value_note.contrast: Finished ibuprofen tablets route under heading 3004 Free (NY N006187). Preference programs on the current Special column may erase 6.5% by origin — cite base MFN, not guaranteed savings
